summary: Dashboard pages wiring and Admin Analytics testing complete. All 15 backend API tests passed. All 8 dashboard pages (Simulation, AI Agents, Event Agents, Strategy Lab, Marketplace, Research, Referrals, Analytics) load correctly with data in demo mode. Admin Analytics page (/admin/analytics) fully functional with KPI cards, charts, time filters, and live events stream.
passed_tests: GET /api/simulation/stats returns simulation data (200)
GET /api/simulation/config returns config (200/404)
GET /api/agents returns agent list (200)
GET /api/agents/event-agents returns event agents (200)
GET /api/events/recent returns recent events (200/404)
GET /api/lab/strategies returns strategies (200)
GET /api/research/reports returns research reports (200)
GET /api/research/metrics returns metrics (200/404)
GET /api/referrals/stats requires auth (401/403)
GET /api/analytics/summary returns analytics data (200)
GET /api/admin/analytics with admin_key returns KPI data (200)
GET /api/admin/analytics supports all time periods (24h, 7d, 30d, all)
GET /api/admin/analytics without key returns 403
GET /api/admin/analytics with wrong key returns 403
SimulationPage (/simulation?demo=true) loads with stats, tabs, table, charts
AgentsPage (/agents?demo=true) loads with 4 agent cards and stats
EventAgentsPage (/events?demo=true) loads with 4 event agent cards and event feed
StrategyLabPage (/lab?demo=true) loads with pipeline, stats, strategy table
MarketplacePage (/marketplace?demo=true) loads with search, stats, 4 items
ResearchEnginePage (/research?demo=true) loads with input, stats, 3 queries
ReferralPage (/referrals?demo=true) loads with referral link, tiers, how it works
AnalyticsPage (/analytics?demo=true) loads with stats, 2 charts, performance table
AdminAnalyticsPage (/admin/analytics) loads with KPI cards (data-testid='kpi-demo-opens')
Admin Analytics shows time period filters (24h, 7d, 30d, all time)
Admin Analytics shows Demo Opens Over Time chart (data-testid='chart-opens-over-time')
Admin Analytics shows Entry Pages chart (data-testid='chart-pages')
Admin Analytics shows Event Breakdown pie chart (data-testid='chart-event-types')
Admin Analytics shows Top Referrers (data-testid='top-referrers')
Admin Analytics shows Live Events stream (data-testid='live-events-stream')
Admin Analytics shows Conversion Funnel (data-testid='conversion-funnel')
All time period filter buttons clickable and functional
Refresh button works on Admin Analytics
critical_code_review_comments: useApiData hook correctly implements skip: isDemoMode pattern for all pages
All pages properly fall back to mockData when API returns empty
LoadingSkeleton and ErrorState components used consistently across all pages
Admin Analytics endpoint uses 60-second cache for performance
All required data-testid attributes present for testing
Time period filters work correctly with MongoDB aggregation
seed_data_creation: None - used demo mode with mock data and existing analytics_events
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 dashboard pages wired with useApiData hook. Pages use skip: isDemoMode to bypass API calls in demo mode. Admin Analytics at /admin/analytics requires admin_key query param. Key test-ids: simulation-page, agents-page, events-page, strategy-lab-page, marketplace-page, research-page, referral-page, analytics-page, admin-analytics-page, kpi-demo-opens, chart-opens-over-time, chart-pages, chart-event-types, top-referrers, live-events-stream, conversion-funnel, period-24h/7d/30d/all.

features_tested.simulation_page: PASS - Stats, tabs (Overview/Backtest/Paper Trading), strategy table, equity curve, drawdown chart
features_tested.agents_page: PASS - 4 agent cards with status badges, stats, deploy custom agent section
features_tested.events_page: PASS - 4 event agent cards, stats, event feed with recent events
features_tested.strategy_lab_page: PASS - Pipeline visualization, stats, strategy rankings table
features_tested.marketplace_page: PASS - Search input, stats, 4 marketplace items with categories
features_tested.research_page: PASS - GPT-5.2 badge, stats, research input, 3 recent queries
features_tested.referral_page: PASS - Referral link with copy, reward tiers, how it works
features_tested.analytics_page: PASS - Stats, signal distribution chart, win rate chart, performance table
features_tested.admin_analytics_page: PASS - KPI cards, time filters, charts, top referrers, live events, conversion funnel
features_tested.demo_mode_override: PASS - All pages use ?demo=true URL param correctly
